chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2193 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Office Objection No. 1 to 3. 2. For orders on CMA No.10717/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 24.09.2025. Petitioner is present in person. ----- The Petitioner alleges that the Official Respondents are interfering with his possession of certain shops while wrongly alleging that same are encroachments, whilst demanding illegal gratification in that regard. If that be the case, the appropriate course of action would be for him to register a Criminal Complaint or approach the concerned Anti- Encroachment Tribunal for availing his remedy in accordance with law. The Petition stands dismissed in the aforementioned terms. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
